notes: Brief referenced 'Barrett Fuel & Propane (NY)' but EDP's Barrett acquisition is Barrett Propane of Prescott, ARIZONA (~4,500 customers). No EDP-owned Barrett entity in NY was located. barrettfuelandpropane.com could not be reached.
